oracle.body: if (!Array.isArray(nodeHeap) || !Array.isArray(valueHeap) || !Array.isArray(nextHeap) || !Array.isArray(prevHeap) || !thisRef || typeof thisRef.ref !== 'number' || typeof target !== 'number') return { ref: -1 }; let cur = thisRef.ref; if (cur === -1) return { ref: -1 }; if (cur < -1 || cur >= nodeHeap.length) return { ref: -1 }; let guard = 0; const maxGuard = nodeHeap.length + 1; while (cur !== -1 && guard <= maxGuard) { if (cur < 0 || cur >= nodeHeap.length) return { ref: -1 }; const node = nodeHeap[cur]; if (!node || typeof node !== 'object' || !('object' in node)) return { ref: -1 }; const valueRef = node.object.fields.value; const nextRef = node.object.fields.next; if (!valueRef || typeof valueRef !== 'object' || typeof valueRef.ref !== 'number') return { ref: -1 }; if (!nextRef || typeof nextRef !== 'object' || typeof nextRef.ref !== 'number') return { ref: -1 }; if (valueRef.ref < 0 || valueRef.ref >= valueHeap.length) return { ref: -1 }; const v = valueHeap[valueRef.ref]; if (typeof v !== 'number') return { ref: -1 }; if (v === target) return { ref: cur }; cur = nextRef.ref; guard += 1; } return { ref: -1 };

components.name: isValueEqTarget
components.bodyJs: if (!thisRef || typeof thisRef !== 'object' || typeof thisRef.ref !== 'number' || !Array.isArray(nodeHeap) || !Array.isArray(valueHeap) || typeof target !== 'number') return 'error'; const i = thisRef.ref; if (i < 0 || i >= nodeHeap.length) return false; const node = nodeHeap[i]; if (!node || typeof node !== 'object' || !('object' in node)) return 'error'; const valueRef = node.object.fields.value; if (!valueRef || typeof valueRef !== 'object' || typeof valueRef.ref !== 'number') return 'error'; if (valueRef.ref < 0 || valueRef.ref >= valueHeap.length) return 'error'; const v = valueHeap[valueRef.ref]; if (typeof v !== 'number') return 'error'; return v === target;
